records.rawExplanation:
*2021 (post-IPO-mania peak + sharp derating — partial coverage):* stock ¥400 (Dec 28) – ¥800 (Feb 2) per Nikkei 10-year history. Feb peak ¥800 was the all-time-high in the 5-year window; Feb→Dec ~-50% decline within the calendar year. FY3/2021 full-year financial numbers not surfaced in search snippets — partial. Stock-move catalyst for the Feb peak / Dec trough: not sourced — catalyst needs_human (likely 2021 SaaS-mania-tail on a micro-cap call-center-SaaS name, but no specific company event named in this round). 業績 (partial) ?? / 株価 ✕✕ by year-end.

Sign summary: shares fell -50% from ¥800 Feb peak to ¥400 by year-end (post-2021-mania derating); shares fell to ¥400 low (Dec 28).

records.rawExplanation:
*2023 (multi-year derating bottoms — partial coverage):* stock ¥306 (Dec 21) – ¥473 (Dec 25). Year-end whipsaw at the trough; -62% off the Feb 2021 peak ¥800. FY3/2023 full-year not surfaced as exact figures. Q1 (calendar Jan-Mar 2023) was a swing back to ordinary-profit black (¥28M, vs ¥114M loss prior-year same period) per one snippet. Stock-move catalyst: not sourced — catalyst needs_human. 業績 (partial — quarter-level positive signal) / 株価 ✕✕ (multi-year low).

Sign summary: revenue fell on weakness; FY3/2024 (prior period for FY3/2025 base) ordinary profit loss ¥276M inferred; revenue declined; shares at multi-year low; shares fell to ¥306 low (Dec 21); business down, stock fell.

records.rawExplanation:
*2024 (transition year — partial coverage):* stock ¥282 (Aug 5) – ¥491 (Oct 10); Aug ¥282 was the lowest print in the 5-year window. Recovery to ¥491 by Oct. FY3/2024 full-year not surfaced — partial (loss-to-profit transition implied from FY3/2025 framing showing "ordinary profit ¥102M black, vs ¥276M loss prior period" — so FY3/2024 had a ¥276M ordinary loss). Stock-move catalyst for Aug ¥282 low → Oct ¥491 recovery: not directly sourced; plausibly tied to mid-year quarterly signal of improving profitability, but unconfirmed — catalyst needs_human. 業績 ✕ (FY3/2024 ordinary loss ¥276M, inferred from FY3/2025 base) / 株価 mixed.

Sign summary: revenue fell on weakness; FY3/2024 ordinary loss ¥276M (inferred); shares set Aug ¥282 low then recovered to ¥491 by October on improving quarterly signal; shares rallied to ¥491 high (Oct 10); business weak, stock rose.

records.rawExplanation:
*2025 (cost-cutting → return to profitability — sourced fundamental catalyst):* FY3/2025 actual (released May 2025 per logmi-finance): **revenue ¥1,906M (-11.5% YoY)**, operating profit ¥75M (+125.5% YoY — turned to black), ordinary profit ¥102M black (vs ¥276M ordinary loss the prior period). Cause cited: 「コスト削減施策の効果」 — cost-reduction measures took effect. Stock ¥265 (Apr 9) – ¥670 (Aug 25) per Nikkei — Apr→Aug ~2.5x rally. **Stock-move catalyst for the Aug ¥670 high: FY3/2025 results-turnaround (cost-cutting → operating profit +125.5%, ordinary profit black-conversion) — sourced [logmi-finance article].** Split-signal: revenue down -11.5% but profit positively flipped via cost-cutting → 業績 split (rev ✕ / profit ◎ — restructuring-margin-recovery pattern, similar to Square Enix's 2025 narrative but at micro-cap scale) / 株価 ◎ (rally on the turnaround).

Cautious side: revenue declining (-11.5%) on the FY3/2025 turn-to-profit means the recovery is cost-cut-led, not demand-led; sustainable growth needs new-service expansion (the new VLOOM AI / GROWCE marketing CRM); micro-cap (~¥1.4B) means the stock can move sharply on thin volume; multi-year derating 2021–2024 lacks specific sourced catalysts.

Sign summary: revenue fell -11.5% YoY; operating profit rose +125.5%; cost-cutting drove operating profit turn to black; ordinary profit ¥102M black vs ¥276M loss prior period; revenue fell -11.5% (split signal — recovering via cost reduction not demand); shares rallied to ¥670 high (Aug 25); business strong, stock strong.


Sources:
- https://finance.logmi.jp/articles/380852 (FY3/2025 cost-cutting turnaround story — black conversion on OP/RP/NP)
- https://moneyworld.jp/news/PHU1563_headline (QUICK 通期決算 FY3/2025)
- https://kabutan.jp/stock/finance?code=3908 (kabutan financial trend page — referenced)
- https://www.collabos.com/ (company overview)
- https://www.buffett-code.com/company/3908/ (segments + business profile)
- https://www.nikkei.com/nkd/company/history/yprice/?scode=3908 (Nikkei 10-year price history)
records.bearCase: revenue declining (-11.5%) on the FY3/2025 turn-to-profit means the recovery is cost-cut-led, not demand-led; sustainable growth needs new-service expansion (the new VLOOM AI / GROWCE marketing CRM); micro-cap (~¥1.4B) means the stock can move sharply on thin volume; multi-year derating 2021–2024 lacks specific sourced catalysts
